name: ml-frontier-mapping
proxy: A new methodological breakthrough is emerging at the intersection of these research areas

criteria.description: Paper presents a new method or significant improvement, not a survey or review
Published or posted within the last 90 days

enrichments.description: Primary methodological contribution in one sentence
Claimed improvement over prior work (percentage or metric)

criteria.description: Paper applies methods from {{topic}} to a different domain or vice versa

enrichments.description: Which domain is the method being transferred to or from
Whether the cross-domain transfer produced competitive results

source.query: {{topic}} deployed production real-world application case study

criteria.description: Company or team has deployed {{topic}} methods in a real product or system, not just research

enrichments.description: What product or system uses this method
Scale of deployment (users, requests, data volume)

conditions.enrichment: Claimed improvement over prior work (percentage or metric)
Whether the cross-domain transfer produced competitive results
Scale of deployment (users, requests, data volume)

signal.proxy: A methodological breakthrough is emerging — new papers with results, cross-domain transfer working, and production deployments appearing simultaneously

_usage.description: Monitors a research frontier for convergence signals. All three lenses firing means the topic is moving from theory to practice.
